description: Perimeter placement radii AFTER clamping against envelope inner lateral. Clamp is `perimDist = min(rawPerimDist, airfieldEnvelopeInnerLateral(template) - 8)`; -8 m leaves clearance inside the flat zone.

us_airbase.note: Unchanged — raw perimDist (240) is well below innerLateral - 8 (281).

forward_strip.note: Clamped from 160 → 132. Perimeter structures now land 8 m inside the flat zone, on the envelope's `targetHeightMode: 'center'` height, eliminating the float/sink against the hard ramp.

validation.vitest_assertion: for both us_airbase and forward_strip, every perimeter-zone structure placement across multiple seeds has Math.hypot(offset.x, offset.z) < airfieldEnvelopeInnerLateral(template). See src/systems/world/AirfieldLayoutGenerator.test.ts.
validation.heightmap_Y_target_m: envelope center height (sampled at runway centerline with samplingRadius = max(12, runwayLength * 0.25)). Perimeter placements at Y_target ± 0.5 m.
